comment.body:
@DimitrisKalaboukas @jo2dan94 

Hello, the issues you reported appear to be intermittent behavior and A/B testing.

After discussing with my teammate (https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/pull/230324#discussion_r3202186875), these new rules are not required because the issue does not always occur.

Please understand our discussion. I'm closing this issue now.
Okay, I'm leaving a comment for the reporters.

issue.title: Fix #230482 macgamingdb.app promotion banner

comment.body:
@ntnguyen1234 Okay, when should I add a `^` suffix separator? I notice that most network-level rules in this file don’t include this symbol.

> Also you forgot `^` in the `||dlso-ap96.macgamingdb.app` rule.

issue.title: www.autoguide.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.title: Fix #230482 macgamingdb.app promotion banner

comment.body:
I think it's better to differentiate more among the descendants of `.grid` element. The ads element seems don't have `data-slot` attribute:

```adblock
macgamingdb.app##.grid > .relative:not([data-slot]):has(> .promotional-banner-border)
```

Also you forgot `^` in the `||dlso-ap96.macgamingdb.app` rule.

issue.title: ottawasun.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: Looks to be caused by `||kindhush.com^$third-party` from `Adblock Warning Removal List`. It sends an XHR request two to four times, which is blocked by that rule and then triggers the Ad‑Shield error.

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
I still can't reproduce it with those steps. I can only reproduce if I disable the scriptlet and add these 2 rules

```adblock
||kindhush.com^$xmlhttprequest
@@||succeedscene.com^$script,badfilter
```

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation

comment.body:
> @ntnguyen1234 Okay, when should I add a `^` suffix separator? I notice that most network-level rules in this file don’t include this symbol.
> 
> > Also you forgot `^` in the `||dlso-ap96.macgamingdb.app` rule.

Yeah, if you add URL path rule, you don't need to add `^` suffix. At first I thought you meant to block the whole `dlso-ap96.macgamingdb.app` domain so it's better to add `^` for domain blocking cases.

issue.title: ottawasun.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: I meant to say Admiral error, not Ad‑Shield. I've corrected that.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
UPD:
это как-то странно работает в течение дня: иногда сайты доступны и видны все запросы в query log.
Иногда сайты не доступны и получаю ошибку ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED.
Иногда сайт просто очень долго пытается загрузиться, в итоге загружается только заголовок страницы и пустая страница. В этом случае в query log запросов к сайтам, которые не открываются не видно.

labels.name: A: Problematic

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/230077#issue-4338285050
>Network error on all streams.

I cannot reproduce network error.
Please ensure that latest AdGuard Extra is used.

<hr>

https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/230077#issuecomment-4341896336
> Bei blockierten embedded Werbeeinblendungen auf twitch.tv wird die Auflösung des Streams auf 160p reduziert. Twitch aktualisiert die Auflösung dann nicht mehr automatisch, nur manuelles Nachstellen hebt die Auflösung wieder.
> 
> Sprich: Man sieht die blockierte Werbung nicht, hat aber einen 160p Stream vor sich.
> 
> Dies scheint eine Anti Blockade Strategie seitens Twitch zu sein.
> 
> Könnte man gegensteuern?

It should be fixed in the latest AdGuard Extra.
